critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_002 (Multi-round, Run 1)

1. UNDERBANKED POPULATION DISPARATE HARM: 1.76 million false declines. Underbanked customers have no payment alternatives. Hard block with no notification creates irreversible individual harm at population scale.

2. REGULATION E HARD BLOCK CONFLICT: Hard block with no review pathway violates Regulation E dispute resolution obligations. Federal legal constraint.

3. RETROSPECTIVE EVALUATION WITHOUT BEHAVIORAL FEEDBACK: Human-reviewed labels from retrospective period. Hard block removes feedback loop. Model retraining impossible without outcome data from declined transactions.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_002 (Multi-round, Run 1 — receives Critic output)

All three points are valid. CONCEDE on all three. The architecture proposed is the problem, not the model.

1. UNDERBANKED: CONCEDE — 1.76 million false declines is the right number. Underbanked harm is asymmetric.
2. REGULATION E: CONCEDE — no rebuttal to a federal legal constraint.
3. BEHAVIORAL FEEDBACK: CONCEDE — hard block eliminates retraining feedback.

debate_rounds.critic_move: No open points — all conceded in initial defense.
debate_rounds.defender_move: Confirming: all three issues conceded. Proposed architecture correction: staged soft-block deployment with mandatory human review queue for 60 days before any hard-block transition.
debate_rounds.resolution: RESOLVED: EMPIRICAL TEST AGREED in initial defense. No further debate needed.

adjudication_raw: All three issues conceded in initial defense. No debate rounds required. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed — staged soft-block pilot required before any hard-block transition.

empirical_test.condition: Staged soft-block deployment with mandatory human review queue for 60 days, measuring false decline complaint rates, Regulation E dispute resolution timelines, and demographic distribution of false declines.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: False decline rates concentrate in underbanked segment or dispute volumes exceed Regulation E capacity.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: False decline rates comparable across segments; disputes handled within Regulation E timeframes.
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Concentration in specific transaction types or merchant categories.
